settings.title: Settings
settings.downloadPathHint2: (294100 is RimWorld's AppID, create directory manually if needed)
settings.ask: Ask (show warning and let user decide)
settings.askDependencies: Ask (show dependencies for user to select)
settings.resetWarning: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults? This will reset:

welcome.title: Welcome to RimWorld Mod Downloader
welcome.subtitle: This wizard will help you complete the initial setup
welcome.subtitle2: Just a few steps to start downloading and managing mods
welcome.steamcmdDescription: SteamCMD is Valve's command-line tool for downloading Steam Workshop content.
welcome.steamcmdDescription2: If you haven't installed it yet, please
welcome.clickToSelect: Click the button on the right to select steamcmd.exe
welcome.autoDerivedPath: Download path has been auto-derived based on SteamCMD location.
welcome.pathNote: 294100 is RimWorld's Steam AppID, mods will be stored here automatically.
welcome.modsFolderDescription: Select your RimWorld's Mods folder as the download destination.
welcome.modsFolderDescription2: You can add multiple paths and set the default by clicking the star.
welcome.clickBelowToAdd: Click the button below to add
welcome.configComplete: You have completed all necessary configurations
welcome.configComplete2: Now you can browse Steam Workshop and download mods

downloadQueue.browseWorkshop: Browse Steam Workshop and click "Download to Local" on any mod

versionMismatchDialog.title: Version Mismatch Warning
versionMismatchDialog.mayNotBeCompatible: Mod may not be compatible with your game version
versionMismatchDialog.forceDownloadWarning: Forcing download of incompatible mods may cause game crashes or save corruption. Make sure you know what you're doing.
versionMismatchDialog.forceAddWarning: Forcing adding of incompatible mods may cause game crashes or save corruption. Make sure you know what you're doing.
versionMismatchDialog.rememberChoice: Remember my choice, don't ask again

deleteConfirmDialog.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirmDialog.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete
deleteConfirmDialog.items: items from the pending download queue?

alerts.pleaseConfigSteamcmd:
Please configure SteamCMD paths first!

1. SteamCMD Executable Path: Location of steamcmd.exe
2. SteamCMD Download Path: steamcmd_root\steamapps\workshop\content\294100

Click the ⚙️ Settings button in the top right to configure.
alerts.steamcmdWarning: Warning: The selected file is not steamcmd.exe, please confirm the path is correct!
alerts.firstRunDetected: First run detected, showing welcome wizard
